author: caravello878962
content:
Hey, all thanks for joining yesterdays working group, here's the forkcast recording https://forkcast.org/calls/etm/003

Moving forward there will be 2 weekly alternating working groups. Join the ones relevant to you.

The current one ⬇️ 
🛠️ Technical working group - focused on EM development 
Next meeting - Wed, May 13 | 15:00 UTC

The new one ⬇️ 
🚀 Business/Marcoms working group - focused on EM awareness & education, stakeholder outreach, partnerships, market research
Next meeting - Wed, May 6 | 15:00 UTC 
https://github.com/shutter-network/encrypted-mempool-pm/issues/3
